title: 15 Days: The Real Story of America's Pandemic School Closures
original_title: 15 Days: The Real Story of America's Pandemic School Closures
overview: a documentary revealing why America's school closures lasted longer than almost any other nation. Framed as a forensic analysis of what happened to children during school closures, it blends director Natalya Murakhver's perspective as a Soviet immigrant with voices of children and families nationwide, exposing devastating learning loss, mental health crises, and inequality.

trailers.title: 15 DAYS: The Trailer They Don't Want You to See
